General.Name: Highest Performances Holdings Inc.
General.Description: Maase Inc. provides technological intelligence and capital investment services in China. The company operates a technology-driven independent financial service platform traded on the Nasdaq; and provides independent wealth management services. The company was founded in 2010 and is based in Chengdu, the People's Republic of China.
